title: health endpoint responds
description: Call GET /health and verify the API reports a healthy status.

title: bulk upload accepts valid zip archive
description: Upload a ZIP archive containing valid image files to POST /api/upload/bulk and verify the response includes uploaded member statuses.

title: bulk upload rejects unsafe zip archives
description: Upload ZIP archives with nested archive members or suspicious compression ratios to POST /api/upload/bulk and verify clear 400-level safety errors.

title: gallery endpoint returns paginated media response
description: Call GET /api/gallery and verify the response includes items, total, page, and limit fields.
